state.next-action: The shared auth foundation, reader workspace contract, and DB-backed reading-state sync are now in place: owner seed, tenant/org seed, long-lived sessions, entitlement/viewer helpers, host-facing login/logout/session routes, reader library/settings/reading-state collections, owner-only workspace settings save, and explicit local-EPUB upload that still keeps import local until the user chooses write-back. Next, let Books execute books-reader-05-04 on top of that layer, then migrate Listen private media to the same access model.

agent-id-policy.rule: Optional: register a unique id in STATE.xml before claiming tasks if you use CLI task-update.
